payload.text: En el creador de fauna hay un tema puntual, hasta donde yo se, el sistema primero genera una descripción de la imagen, y luego rellena los campos, el campo específicamente de la descripción lo rellena algo largo, limitalo para los 300 pero eso si, en el prompt pide 300 pero al campo, dale un límite de 400 por que él generador nunca es tan preciso en la cantidad de palabras, ojo, este cambio es para los campos que se rellenan, la descripción interna qué hace luego para rellenar los campos es muy buena, siempre identifica bien la criatura en las imágenes

**Revising Image Handling**

I've been meticulously analyzing the user request. The core is the AI image processing within the "Create Fauna" form. My focus is on understanding the current workflow to suggest effective changes for the user. I'm prioritizing accuracy and efficiency in this analysis.


**Analyzing Description Limits**

I've homed in on the description field length issue. My focus is on implementing a character limit for the AI-generated descriptions to align with the UI's constraints. I'm planning to adjust the AI prompt to request a maximum of 300 characters, while setting the field validation to 400. This ensures the best output for the user. I've noted that the user likes the analysis, so I'll keep that.


**Updating Prompt Strategy**

I'm currently refining the prompt logic within `handleGenerate`. The goal is to explicitly instruct the AI about the 300-character limit for descriptions. I'll revise the existing prompt construction to request a concise description suitable for the `descripcion` field, aiming for brevity and clarity. This adjustment ensures alignment with UI constraints, improving the user experience and maintaining data integrity.


**Clarifying Prompt Instructions**

I'm now revising the prompt. The user's input clearly indicates a character limit. My focus is on updating the `promptText`. I will now implement "La descripción debe ser concisa, máximo 300 caracteres." to ensure AI-generated descriptions are concise and UI-compatible. I will verify that the relevant component in the UI also includes the `maxLength` attribute as specified by the user.


**Validating UI & Logic**

I'm now integrating the UI adjustments with the prompt strategy. My focus is on ensuring the `maxLength` attribute in the `textarea` aligns perfectly with the AI's output. I've updated the `maxLength` to 400. Next, I will modify the prompt to account for this change, refining the `faunaSchema` description for the `descripcion` field, aiming for consistency.


**Adjusting the Character Limit**

I've just finished the code changes. I've increased the `maxLength` attribute of the textarea to 400. Within the prompt, I've implemented a clearer request for a 300-character description by specifying, "Descripción concisa para el juego. Máximo 300 caracteres." I'm confident that this modification, alongside adjusting the schema, will provide the user with the most appropriate results and meet their requirement for description length.


**Integrating Image & Text**

I'm now integrating the image processing with the adjusted text description. I'm focusing on ensuring the prompt continues to effectively analyze image morphology while also respecting the 300-character description limit, aligning with the user's intent to keep the image component intact.


**Modifying the Prompt**

I'm now revising the prompt further. I've noted the new instruction to vary descriptions based on the provided entity type. I'll modify the prompt to include explicit instructions to use either "verme" or "mecanoide" based on whether the entity is a "gusano" or "robot", respectively. Crucially, I'm appending the existing length constraint of 300 characters to ensure alignment with the new requirement.

Entendido. Haré los ajustes en `CreateFaunaForm.tsx` para dar más holgura al campo de texto (400 caracteres) pero instruir estrictamente a la IA (vía Prompt y Schema) para que intente mantenerse bajo los 300 caracteres, asegurando que la descripción encaje bien en las tarjetas de la UI sin perder la calidad del análisis morfológico interno.

Aquí tienes los cambios:

entries.description: Updated description maxLength to 400 and added specific character limit instructions to the AI prompt and schema.
